_publications._publicationTitle: Transplantation of miPSC/mESC-derived retinal ganglion cells into healthy and glaucomatous retinas.

_contextSnippet: In adult hosts, both intravitreal and subretinal delivery of Thy1-GFP+ RGCs resulted in 80% transplant success, with 8/10 animals...intravitreal delivery within pups showed an enhanced success rate of 100%, with 9/9 animals
details: Transplantation success rate of 80% in adult hosts (8/10 animals) for both intravitreal and subretinal delivery, and 100% success rate in P2-P4 pups (9/9 animals) for intravitreal delivery
